name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial benefit of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to eligible farmer families.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance coverage against unforeseen crop losses or damage.

name: Bhumihin Krishak Bandhu (Landless Farmer Scheme)
description: Main scheme for landless farmers in West Bengal. Provides financial help to those with no agricultural land who work on others' land.
applySteps: Through Duare Sarkar camps, BDO office, or Agriculture portal
Submit Aadhaar, Bank account, Address proof, and Self-declaration (no land)

name: Krishak Bandhu (for sharecroppers also)
description: Financial assistance for registered sharecroppers (Bhagchasi) and farmers, providing social security and death benefit insurance.
applySteps: Apply via Duare Sarkar camps, BDO or ADA office
Ensure registration as a sharecropper or farmer

name: Farm Mechanization Scheme (FSSM)
description: Financial support to small and marginal farmers for purchasing power-operated farm equipment in WB.

name: Amar Fasal Amar Gola/Gari
description: Subsidies for constructing storehouses and purchasing vending carts to reduce post-harvest losses.

name: Bangla Shasya Bima
description: Free crop insurance for West Bengal farmers. The state bears the entire premium.

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
description: Supports minor irrigation and agricultural infrastructure development, prioritising small/marginal farmers.
